title: BlockedAction
description: A record of an action that was blocked by policy.

blocked_id.description: Unique identifier for this blocked action record.

action_id.description: The action proposal that was blocked.

run_id.description: The run this blocked action belongs to.

reason.description: The reason the action was blocked.

policy_name.description: The policy that blocked the action.

blocked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the action was blocked.
